spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    l.source_name as "Player",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Damage",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Healing"
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e ON l.source_id = e.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.log_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND l.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND l.source_name IS NOT NULL
    AND l.source_name != 'NULL'
    AND l.source_name != ''
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (
        l.victim_name = 'SELF'
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.victim_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Player'
        ))
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.victim_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Creature'
        ))
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND ('All' IN (${power_name:sqlstring}) OR l.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring}))
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY l.source_name  -- добавили GROUP BY
ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END) + 
          SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END)) DESC;

SELECT 
    l.victim_name as "Target",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Damage Taken",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Healing Received"
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e ON l.victim_id = e.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.log_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND l.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND l.victim_name IS NOT NULL
    AND l.victim_name != 'NULL'
    AND l.victim_name != ''
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим (кто наносит)
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.source_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Player'
        ))
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.source_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Creature'
        ))
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям (кто получает) - ИСПРАВЛЕНО
    AND (
        -- Если выбран SELF
        ('SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND l.victim_name = 'SELF')
        -- Если выбраны ALL_PLAYERS
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e.entity_type = 'Player' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        -- Если выбраны ALL_ENEMIES
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e.entity_type = 'Creature' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        -- Если выбраны конкретные имена
        OR (
            NOT 'SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND ('All' IN (${power_name:sqlstring}) OR l.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring}))
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY l.victim_name
ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END) + 
          SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END)) DESC;

SELECT 
    $__timeGroup(l.log_timestamp, '5s') as time,
    l.source_name as metric,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN 'heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            WHEN 'damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) / 5 as "DPS / HPS"
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e ON l.source_id = e.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (
        l.victim_name = 'SELF'
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.victim_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Player'
        ))
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.victim_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Creature'
        ))
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND ('All' IN (${power_name:sqlstring}) OR l.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring}))
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY 1, 2;

SELECT 
    $__timeGroup(l.log_timestamp, '5s') as time,
    l.victim_name as metric,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN 'heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            WHEN 'damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) / 5 as "DPS / HPS Received"
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e ON l.victim_id = e.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим (кто наносит)
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.source_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Player'
        ))
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entity_types e2 WHERE e2.entity_id = l.source_id AND e2.entity_type = 'Creature'
        ))
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям (кто получает)
    AND (
        l.victim_name = 'SELF'
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND ('All' IN (${power_name:sqlstring}) OR l.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring}))
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY 1, 2;

spec.definition:
SELECT 
    __value,
    __text,
    __description
FROM (
    -- Все игроки (группа)
    SELECT 
        'ALL_PLAYERS' as __value,
        '👥 All Players' as __text,
        'Select all players' as __description,
        -2 as sort_order
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Все существа (группа)
    SELECT 
        'ALL_ENEMIES' as __value,
        '🔴 All Creatures' as __text,
        'Select all creatures' as __description,
        -1 as sort_order
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Индивидуальные игроки (исключая SELF)
    SELECT DISTINCT
        l.source_name as __value,
        CONCAT('👤 ', l.source_name) as __text,
        'Player' as __description,
        0 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entity_types e ON l.source_id = e.entity_id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Player'
        AND l.source_name IS NOT NULL
        AND l.source_name NOT IN ('NULL', '', 'SELF')
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Индивидуальные существа (исключая SELF)
    SELECT DISTINCT
        l.source_name as __value,
        CONCAT('🔴 ', l.source_name) as __text,
        'Creature' as __description,
        1 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entity_types e ON l.source_id = e.entity_id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Creature'
        AND l.source_name IS NOT NULL
        AND l.source_name NOT IN ('NULL', '', 'SELF')
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
) all_sources
WHERE __value != 'SELF'  -- дополнительная фильтрация
ORDER BY sort_order, __text;
spec.label: Atacker/Healer
spec.name: source_player

spec.definition:
SELECT 
    __value,
    __text,
    __description
FROM (
    -- SELF отдельно
    SELECT 
        'SELF' as __value,
        '🔄 Self' as __text,
        'Self-targeting effects' as __description,
        -3 as sort_order
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Все игроки (группа)
    SELECT 
        'ALL_PLAYERS' as __value,
        '👥 All Players' as __text,
        'Select all players' as __description,
        -2 as sort_order
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Все враги (группа)
    SELECT 
        'ALL_ENEMIES' as __value,
        '🔴 All Creatures' as __text,
        'Select all enemies/creatures' as __description,
        -1 as sort_order
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Индивидуальные игроки
    SELECT DISTINCT
        l.victim_name as __value,
        CONCAT('👤 ', l.victim_name) as __text,
        'Player' as __description,
        0 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entity_types e ON l.victim_id = e.entity_id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Player'
        AND l.victim_name IS NOT NULL
        AND l.victim_name NOT IN ('NULL', '', 'SELF')
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Индивидуальные враги
    SELECT DISTINCT
        l.victim_name as __value,
        CONCAT('🔴 ', l.victim_name) as __text,
        'Enemy/Creature' as __description,
        1 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entity_types e ON l.victim_id = e.entity_id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Creature'
        AND l.victim_name IS NOT NULL
        AND l.victim_name NOT IN ('NULL', '', 'SELF')
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
) all_victims
ORDER BY sort_order, __text;
spec.label: Target
spec.name: victim_player

spec.definition:
-- Типы воздействия
SELECT 'damage' as __value, '💥 Damage' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'heal' as __value, '💚 Healing' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'all' as __value, '⚔️ All' as __text;
spec.label: Impact type
spec.name: impact_type

spec.__legacyStringValue:
-- Типы воздействия
SELECT 'damage' as __value, '💥 Damage' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'heal' as __value, '💚 Healing' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'all' as __value, '⚔️ All' as __text;

spec.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    l.power_name as __value,
    l.power_name as __text,
    CONCAT('Uses: ', COUNT(*)) as __description
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.entity_id
LEFT JOIN entity_types e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.power_name IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.power_name != ''
    AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим (source_player)
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям (victim_player)
    AND (
        ('SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND l.victim_name = 'SELF')
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        OR (
            NOT 'SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия (impact_type)
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по энергии
    AND l.attack_type != 'Power'
    
GROUP BY l.power_name
ORDER BY l.power_name;
spec.label: Power
spec.name: power_name

spec.__legacyStringValue:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    l.power_name as __value,
    l.power_name as __text,
    CONCAT('Uses: ', COUNT(*)) as __description
FROM combat_logs l
LEFT JOIN entity_types e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.entity_id
LEFT JOIN entity_types e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.entity_id
WHERE 
    l.power_name IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.power_name != ''
    AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим (source_player)
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.source_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям (victim_player)
    AND (
        ('SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND l.victim_name = 'SELF')
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) 
            AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature' 
            AND l.victim_name != 'SELF')
        OR (
            NOT 'SELF' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND l.victim_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия (impact_type)
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по энергии
    AND l.attack_type != 'Power'
    
GROUP BY l.power_name
ORDER BY l.power_name;
